name: Soaring Eagle Acquisition Corp.
summary: Soaring Eagle Acquisition Corp. focuses on effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was formerly known as Spinning Eagle Acquisition Corp and changed its name to Soaring Eagle Acquisition Corp. in February 2021. The company was founded in 2020 and is based in New York, New York.
